title: Glitchy Slit Scan Hydra port over loaded clip

metricComparisons.description: Glitchy Slit Scan's moving slit-memory branch should add visible motion-memory drift over the dry fixture baseline (observed ~+0.0055 on ci-smoke.mp4; threshold set at +0.003 for margin)

expectedVideo: the clip should cut into a moving slit-memory layer rather than reading as a generic mask or blur
expectedAudio: the coupled sound should feel like a thin moving spectral cut with persistence and scrape more than obvious detune
manualChecks: Does the slit layer read as motion memory instead of a noisy mask artifact?
